message:
feat(config): add CASS injection configuration (ntm-1pnr)

Add configuration for CASS auto-injection to enable automatic context
injection before prompts:

Config fields added to CASSContextConfig:
- min_relevance (float64, 0-1): minimum relevance score to include
- skip_if_context_above (float64, 0-100): skip injection if context usage exceeds %
- prefer_same_project (bool): prefer results from same project

Features:
- Environment variable overrides: NTM_CASS_CONTEXT_ENABLED,
  NTM_CASS_MIN_RELEVANCE, NTM_CASS_SKIP_IF_CONTEXT_ABOVE,
  NTM_CASS_PREFER_SAME_PROJECT
- Validation for all new fields with proper bounds checking
- GetValue() support for cass.context.* paths
- Diff() support for showing non-default values
- Print() outputs [cass.context] section with all fields

Defaults:
- min_relevance: 0.5 (50% threshold)
- skip_if_context_above: 80 (skip when context > 80% full)
- prefer_same_project: true
